content:
# Paleoredox

**Summary**: The chemical state of oxygen in the environment, influencing mineral precipitation.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] evaluated paleoredox using ratios like V/Cr, Mo/Al, Co/Al, and Fe/Al.

## Scientific Context

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] Determines if conditions were oxic, anoxic, or dysoxic.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] Analyzed via trace element ratios (V/Cr, Mo/Al, Co/Al, Fe/Al).

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Co/Al and Fe/Al showed a major change at the base of facies Mdg; Mo/Al fluctuated irregularly. ([[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018, p. 98]])
